{{Infobox concept
| name = Herald Remnant
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A black dragon Herald [[Remnant]] can be overwhelming.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Herald]] [[Remnants]] are physically robust and tend to retain a greater measure of their original will.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Herald]] [[Remnants]] are uncommon.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
